name: gen-doc
description: Evaluations for gen-doc skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit-commands
evals.description: Skill should trigger on explicit gen-doc invocations and API doc generation requests

prompts.input: generate API docs for the changed endpoints
prompts.reason: Natural language API doc generation request matches skill trigger

prompts.input: The API changed, update the OpenAPI documentation
prompts.reason: API changed trigger phrase explicitly listed in skill description

evals.name: trigger-positive-openapi
evals.description: Skill should trigger on OpenAPI and swagger related doc requests

prompts.input: generate OpenAPI spec for this project
prompts.reason: generate OpenAPI trigger phrase in skill description

prompts.input: sync swagger docs with the current codebase
prompts.reason: sync swagger trigger phrase in skill description

evals.name: trigger-negative-unrelated-docs
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for non-API documentation requests

prompts.input: Write a README for this project
Add JSDoc comments to this function
prompts.reason: Inline code documentation, not OpenAPI spec generation

prompts.input: Create a wiki page explaining the architecture
prompts.reason: Architecture documentation, not REST API doc generation
